name: Thomas Edison
abstract: Thomas Alva Edison (February 11, 1847 – October 18, 1931) was an American inventor and businessman. He grew up in Michigan with little formal schooling and began working at a young age.

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy McRae
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] That's now called Thomas Edison -- >> [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah, Thomas Edison.

about_quotes.speaker: Louis Armstrong
about_quotes.evidence: One Thomas Edison One Henry Ford I put him above all those people too
